summary: Set 048 Session 2 ships the Lightweight-tier --no-router mode infrastructure per audit-locked spec §3.1 (activation: three-knob CLI>env>spec>default precedence with override logging), §3.4 (tri-state requiresUAT/E2E schema validation), §3.5 (external-verification.md soft gate with TTY/non-TTY branching + --accept-suggestions bypass), and §3.6 (spec.md tier field). Four commits land 98 new Python tests + 10 new TS tests on top of 6 updated test-fixture files. Cross-provider verification (sonnet route + gemini-pro verify, $0.147 routed) returned ISSUES_FOUND with 7 findings: Critical #1 route/verify silent-swallow (FIXED, fail-CLOSED), Major #2 bare imports (FALSE POSITIVE, matches package convention), Major #3 activity-log race (FIXED, atomic-rename), Major #4 resolve_no_router_mode re-entry (FIXED, no-op on re-entry), Important #5 false-positive tier detection (FIXED, tier read only from canonical YAML block, Set 015 fallback preserved for UAT/E2E), Minor #6 timestamp not UTC (FIXED), Suggestion #7 lazy cache (DEFERRED). 2 new regression tests for I5. Cumulative Set 048 spend $0.250 of $10 NTE (2.5%). Pattern lesson reinforced: verifier ruled VERIFIED on the REVIEW QUALITY (gemini-pro confirmed sonnet's findings as valid); the route response's ISSUES_FOUND signal is the substantive verdict. The deferred suggestion_disposition runtime gate is documented in the suggestion_disposition.py module docstring + Commit D commit message + s2-close-reason.md; S3 ships that gate alongside the AI-orchestrator question flow and workflow doc update.

reason.specifics: Set 048 Session 3 (combined copyable-prompt commands + context-menu IA refresh per operator's Bias 7 disposition) builds on S2's --no-router infrastructure. S3 lands: (a) the AI-orchestrator's upfront positive-confirmation prompt for 'suggested' UAT/E2E + workflow doc update; (b) the close-out gate that consumes recorded suggestion_disposition entries (deferred from S2); (c) the three copyable-prompt commands per L1 path-reference format; (d) the QuickPick-based hierarchical context menu per L2/L3/L4; (e) the L5 left-click dual action (open spec + copy 'start next session' + toast).
